PLAINTIFF CHARLES BURDEN Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS CONTINUED TO 11/30/10 PER EX PARTE ORDER. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

Ntc Of Hearing And Pltfs Motion To Compel Further Response To Interrogatory No 3
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CHARLES BURDEN's Motion to Compel Further Response to Interrogatory No. 3 is DENIED. The identifying information requested by the plaintiff is entitled to privacy protection and therefore shielded from disclosure absent notice and an opportunity to object under Pioneer Electronics. Request for sanctions is denied. Judge: MONICA A. WILEY, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-04-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-21-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

Off Calendar May-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHARLES BURDEN DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is overruled.
